narrative:
Pickerington City D (precinct in Fairfield County) has 882 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
